title: Total Employee Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator to compute the fully loaded cost of an employee, including direct compensation, indirect benefits, overhead, and productivity loss factors, aligned with ISO 30400, Lean, and Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Base Annual Salary
inputs.businessContext: Annual gross salary before any deductions or benefits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual gross salary before any deductions or benefits.

inputs.label: Target Bonus (% of base salary)
inputs.businessContext: Typical annual bonus as a percentage of base salary.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical annual bonus as a percentage of base salary.

inputs.label: Benefits Cost (% of base salary)
inputs.businessContext: Includes health insurance, retirement contributions, paid leave, etc. Typical range 25-40%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Includes health insurance, retirement contributions, paid leave, etc. Typical range 25-40%.

inputs.label: Payroll Tax (% of base salary)
inputs.businessContext: Employer portion of Social Security and Medicare (FICA) in the US.

businessContext_i18n.en: Employer portion of Social Security and Medicare (FICA) in the US.

inputs.label: Overhead Allocation (% of direct cost)
inputs.businessContext: Facilities, equipment, IT, admin support allocated per employee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Facilities, equipment, IT, admin support allocated per employee.

inputs.label: Annual Training Cost per Employee
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost of training programs, certifications, and development.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct cost of training programs, certifications, and development.

inputs.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Lean metric: actual productive time vs. available time. 1 = full productivity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lean metric: actual productive time vs. available time. 1 = full productivity.

inputs.label: Annual Turnover Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of employees leaving per year. Drives replacement and ramp-up costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of employees leaving per year. Drives replacement and ramp-up costs.

inputs.label: Replacement Cost (% of base salary)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of recruiting, hiring, and onboarding a replacement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of recruiting, hiring, and onboarding a replacement.

inputs.label: Average Overtime Hours per Week
inputs.businessContext: Average weekly overtime hours per employee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average weekly overtime hours per employee.

inputs.label: Overtime Premium (multiplier)
inputs.businessContext: Typically 1.5x for time-and-a-half, 2x for double time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typically 1.5x for time-and-a-half, 2x for double time.

inputs.label: Include Hidden Cost Drivers
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include absenteeism, engagement loss, and quality costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to include absenteeism, engagement loss, and quality costs.

rules.message: Sum of bonus, benefits, and payroll tax percentages exceeds 100% of base salary. Please adjust.
High turnover rate with low replacement cost may underestimate true cost. Consider increasing replacement cost.

thresholds.alert: Total employee cost exceeds $150,000. Review cost reduction opportunities.
Hidden loss drivers exceed 15% of total cost. Investigate productivity and turnover issues.

formulas.label: Benefits and Payroll Taxes
formulas.description: Total benefits and employer payroll taxes.

formulas.label: Overhead Allocation
formulas.description: Allocated overhead based on direct cost.

formulas.label: Overtime Cost
formulas.description: Annual overtime cost based on hourly rate (2080 hours/year).

formulas.label: Hidden Loss Drivers
formulas.description: Estimated cost of absenteeism, disengagement, and quality defects (5% of direct cost).

formulas.label: Total Employee Cost (Primary Result)
formulas.formula: direct_compensation + benefits_and_taxes + overhead_cost + training_cost + overtime_cost + turnover_cost + hidden_loss_drivers
formulas.description: Fully loaded annual cost per employee.

primary.label: Total Employee Cost
primary.description: Fully loaded annual cost per employee.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Absenteeism Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of unplanned absences beyond paid leave.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Disengagement Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Productivity loss due to low engagement.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Quality Defect Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Rework and scrap costs attributable to employee.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Overtime
suggestedActions.description: If overtime cost > 5% of total cost, consider hiring additional staff or process improvement.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Retention
suggestedActions.description: If turnover cost > 10% of total cost, implement retention programs and exit interviews.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Benefits
suggestedActions.description: Benchmark benefits against industry to ensure cost-effectiveness.

suggestedActions.label: Lean Productivity Improvement
suggestedActions.description: If productivity factor < 0.8, conduct value stream mapping to reduce waste.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Cost
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total cost adjusted for data quality confidence (e.g., ±10% uncertainty).
